decontamination_notes: Real fix from celery/celery PR #10346, merged 2026-06-10, after model training cutoffs. Concurrency bug in AsynPool.flush(): must preserve _busy_workers for workers running accepted jobs (via _write_to, fallback _scheduled_for) instead of clearing the set, while still dropping non-running workers. Repo sliced at base commit; BSD LICENSE preserved. Runs in per-task image vulcanbench/sandbox:celery-10346 (celery runtime deps preinstalled, celery imported from workspace via PYTHONPATH=.). Test adapts the PR's own unit tests using a patched billiard worker-process factory.
